channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hapless Pelicans 'embarrassed' by their 'disgusting' loss to the struggling Raptors
item.description: Suffice to say Dejounte Murray enjoyed his first game in a New Orleans Pelicans uniform a lot more than his long-awaited second.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani seeks $325,000 worth of baseball cards from his ex-interpreter
item.description: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani wants his former interpreter to hand over hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of baseball cards he says were fraudulently bought using his money.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rams' Demarcus Robinson will play vs. Saints less than 1 week after DUI arrest
item.description: Demarcus Robinson is expected to play against the Saints Sunday, less than a week after being arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence at over 100 mph.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Late goals by US stars are a Champions League thanksgiving for PSV Eindhoven
item.description: EINDHOVEN, Netherlands (AP) — PSV Eindhoven was giving thanks to its United States internationals in the Champions League on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: West Virginia knocks off No. 3 Gonzaga 86-78 in overtime in the Battle 4 Atlantis
item.description: Javon Small scored five of his 31 points in overtime and Tucker DeVries added key free throws late in regulation and finished with 16 points as West Virginia beat No. 3 Gonzaga 86-78 in the Battle 4 Atlantis.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Raiders will start O'Connell at quarterback when they visit the Chiefs
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Aidan O'Connell will start at quarterback when the Las Vegas Raiders visit their AFC West rival and two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blake Snell and Dodgers agree to $182 million, 5-year contract, AP source says
item.description: Less than a month after winning the World Series, the Los Angeles Dodgers are spending big again to add one of baseball's best pitchers to their star-studded roster.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Orlando takes on Chicago, aims for 4th straight win
item.description: Chicago Bulls (8-11, ninth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Orlando Magic (12-7, third in the Eastern Conference) Orlando, Florida; Wednesday, 7 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Staley counsels some South Carolina fans to keep calm after No. 4 Gamecocks 1st loss in two seasons
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina coach Dawn Staley is not in panic mode, even if some of her famous “Fams” are following the Gamecocks' first loss in two seasons. Sure, South Carolina has only lost twice in its past 87 games.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travis Kelce jokes that Jason and Kylie should 'go for the starting five' after announcement of 4th child
item.description: Travis Kelce jokingly suggested that Jason and Kylie Kelce should try and "go for the starting five" after the couple announced they are expecting their fourth child.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luis Suarez signs to stay with Messi and Inter Miami for 2025 season
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Luis Suarez is going to play alongside Lionel Messi for at least one more year. Suarez and Inter Miami have agreed on a one-year contract extension for the coming season, the team announced Wednesday. The financial terms weren't disclosed.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge tosses suit to block trans athlete from NCAA women's tourney
item.description: The judge also noted in his ruling that "no defendant disputed that San Jose State rosters a trans woman volleyball player.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Broome has 23 points and 19 rebounds as No. 4 Auburn tops No. 12 UNC 85-72 to reach Maui title game
item.description: LAHAINA, Hawaii (AP) — Johni Broome had 23 points and a career-best 19 rebounds to lead No. 4 Auburn to an 85-72 victory over No. 12 North Carolina in a Maui Invitational semifinal Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 UConn falls again in Maui, losing 73-72 to Colorado on Jakimovski's off-balance layup
item.description: LAHAINA, Hawaii (AP) — Andrej Jakimovski converted an off-balance layup with 8 seconds left, and Colorado handed No. 2 UConn its second loss in two days at the Maui Invitational, beating the two-time defending national champion 73-72 on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kansas center Hunter Dickinson ejected for kicking Duke's Maliq Brown in the head
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Kansas center Hunter Dickinson was ejected midway through the second half of the top-ranked Jayhawks' 75-72 victory over No. 11 Duke on Tuesday night for kicking the Blue Devils' Maliq Brown in the head.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CU Buffs basketball upsets defending champion UConn at Maui Invitational
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — What a huge win for Tadd Boyle and the Colorado Buffaloes. A 14.5-point underdog against the two-time defending national champion #2 UConn Huskies at the Maui Invitational, CU erased an early 11-point deficit before going blow for blow in the second half.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bucks hold Antetokounmpo out of NBA Cup game at Miami with swelling in left knee
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Giannis Antetokounmpo, the league's leading scorer this season, was unexpectedly held out of the Milwaukee Bucks' NBA Cup game at the Miami Heat on Tuesday night with swelling in his left knee. He had been expected to play until about an hour before the game.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dejounte Murray is rejoining the Pelicans vs. Toronto and drawing inspiration from his mother
item.description: METAIRIE, La. (AP) — Dejounte Murray plans to return to the New Orleans Pelicans ' lineup on Wednesday night for the first time since fracturing his left hand in a season-opening victory over Chicago on Oct. 23.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds ruling to allow SJSU women's volleyball team member to play
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender. The 10th U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Rams WR Demarcus Robinson arrested on suspicion of DUI after loss to Eagles
item.description: Los Angeles Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence early Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hagel ties NHL record with 4 assists in 1st period, Lightning beat Avalanche 8-2
item.description: Brandon Hagel tied an NHL record with four assists in the opening period and finished with five as the Tampa Bay Lightning cruised past the Colorado Avalanche 8-2 on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Two senators urge FIFA not to pick Saudi Arabia as 2034 host
item.description: Democrats Ron Wyden of Oregon and Dick Durbin of Illinois have told FIFA president Gianni Infantino in a letter “we urge you to seek out a host country with a record of upholding human rights.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Buccaneers QB Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against his father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family in Austin has boiled over into a lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, WGN 9

item.title: Broncos def. Raiders 29-19
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Denver Broncos overcame a sluggish start to secure a 29-19 win over the Las Vegas Raiders on Sunday, thanks to a second-half spark from quarterback Bo Nix.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: No. 5 UCLA women stun No. 1 South Carolina 77-62, snap Gamecocks' 43-game win streak
item.description: Londynn Jones scored 15 points, making all five of her 3-pointers, and fifth-ranked UCLA stunned No. 1 South Carolina 77-62 on Sunday, ending the Gamecocks’ overall 43-game winning streak and their run of 33 consecutive road victories.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: USF football rolls to bowl eligibility for 2nd straight year with 63-30 dismantling of Tulsa
item.description: South Florida (6-5; 4-3 American) earned the program’s 12th bowl appearance in 24 seasons of play at the FBS level, posting 715 yards of offense in a 63-30 domination of Tulsa (3-8; 1-6 American) Saturday on Senior Day in Raymond James Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Scotty Pippen Jr. scores career-high 30 points in Grizzlies' 142-131 win over Bulls
item.description: Scotty Pippen Jr. had a career-best 30 points with 10 assists to lead the Memphis Grizzlies past the Chicago Bulls 142-131 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utes out of bowl game contention after 31-28 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down to their fifth-string quarterback, the Utes football team almost pulled out a spectacular comeback against #22 Iowa State, only to lose its seventh straight game, 31-28.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Caprock Academy Hockey plays first ever varsity game
item.description: The Caprock Academy Eagles -- featuring players from all five Valley schools (Grand Junction, Palisade, Fruita, Central and Caprock) -- kicked off their inaugural varsity season at the Jorgensen Event Center in Gunnison against Colorado Academy.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026 after Milton; new ballpark deal dies: Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WGN 9

item.title: 2024 F1 Las Vegas Grand Prix preview: Racing down the Strip
item.description: The 2024 Formula 1 World Championship heads to Las Vegas this weekend for what will be the third to last race of the season.
item.dc:creator: Viknesh Vijayenthiran - Motor Authority, Fox 5

item.title: Corner Canyon wins back-to-back 6A championships
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Corner Canyon dynasty continues. The Chargers won their second straight 6A state championship, and fourth in the last six years, with a hard-fought 30-27 win over Lone Peak, avenging their lone loss in the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bountiful beats Roy to win 5A state title, 42-35
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Last month, Bountiful handed Roy its only regular season loss of the year, 42-35. It was a repeat performance in the championship game Thursday at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
